Dhana Restaurant & Cafe sits right inside APD Sports Hub Turf in Tiruvarur — a fully air-conditioned spot for honest South Indian food after your match, your study session, or your evening with family.

Proud Amul Outlet

Real Milk. Real Ice Cream.

Dhana Cafe is an authorised Amul ice cream outlet — so every tub you get here is the genuine Amul you grew up with, kept ready alongside your briyani and dosai.

Ask About Today's Flavours

Why Dhana

Built for Families, Students & Players

Perfect for Families

Delicious food for everyone, served in a clean, relaxed space.

Ideal for Students

Tasty, filling and budget-friendly — easy on the pocket, every day.

A/C Ambience

Comfortable, clean and relaxing — a real break from the heat.

Great Food, Best Taste

Honest South Indian cooking, made fresh, at prices that make sense.

One Address, Two Reasons to Visit

Book the Turf. Eat at Dhana.

APD Sports Hub Turf is open 24×7, right next door — box cricket and football, day slots at ₹499/hr and night slots at ₹699/hr. Play your match, then walk straight over to Dhana for hot briyani and Amul ice cream.

🎯 Box Cricket ⚽ Football Turf ⭐ 5.0 Google Rating
